rationale: Acting on Review 2 produces the better PR: its four findings (bundling of AffineAlgGroup, naive IsUnipotent, premature True-stub ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup, and k-points-only AlgPoints) are all directly visible in the diff, grounded in the quoted roadmap violations, and require the same material scope corrections as Review 1 plus the additional AlgPoints fix; Review 1's block verdict and removal-only guidance would leave AlgPoints unfixed while achieving an otherwise equivalent (or smaller) result.
